violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Used syrup pump being stored in the handwashing sink at the time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap dispenser next to the drive up was empty.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
